title: MTR Low Effort Retextured Trains
description: Some irl trains from retextured M-Trains and more for the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod!
body:
# MTR Low Effort Retextured Trains
![Class 700](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4ce3270cf1e2ec83a1eee44eeb1433fdaf3d2e0.png)
Made with basically **no** effort, this pack is here for giving you trains from the real world **before** other people even have made them yet!
## What can you find?
- British Rail Classes 710, 720, 700, 745, 156, 152
- London Underground 2009 Stock
- NIR Class 3000, 4000
- IÉ Class 8500, 8510, 8520
- Osaka Metro 21, 22, 23, 24, 25 Series
## Credits
Navi / LX9702: Making the BR Classes 507s & 508s, which the BR Classes 156s & 152s in this pack are based on
## Notes
These packs have not been tested in MTR4, and may be broken in certain ways when using it. Please use these packs for MTR4 at your own costs of OCD kicking in.

/Loweffortmoment
